Created attachment 254067
Poudreire build log file.

Trying to build on poudriere server and I get this error:

===>  Building for py311-towncrier23-23.11.0
* Getting build dependencies for wheel...

ERROR Missing dependencies:
	incremental
	setuptools>=61.0
*** Error code 1


I can build both incremental and setuptools just fine.
